response.justification: Candidate is a highly experienced senior/staff engineer applying for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role — a severe seniority mismatch that typically signals high flight risk and compensation misalignment. Technical background is strong but Java is not a primary skill (listed once at the end), and German is only Basic where the role requires strong written and verbal German for insurance clients. Background is web/data/GIS rather than enterprise Java or insurance.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot software development with strong architecture and testing discipline
Solid agile/TDD/CI-CD experience and demonstrated teaching/mentoring through workshops
Already based in Berlin with EU work history and broad full-stack capability
concerns: Massive overqualification for an entry-level role — likely retention and salary mismatch
Only Basic German, while role requires strong verbal and written German
Java is a minor skill; primary stack is TypeScript/Node/DLang, no insurance-domain experience

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering experience and agile/TDD background
